name: Stosstruppen of the Free State of Prussia
description: Prussian assault specialists. 3 Fireteams, grenade masters, 2-8 Shock Troopers required.
add_rules: Prussian Names: Lieutenant = Hauptmann, Trench Cleric = Feldkaplan, Shock Trooper = Stosstruppen. Treat as the same entries.
Expert Fireteams: Up to 3 Fireteams instead of 2.
Masters of the Grenade: +4" Range to all Grenades.
Rapid Assault: +1 DICE to Risky Success Roll for Dash ACTION (purchasable upgrade).
Athleticism: Lieutenant (Hauptmann) and Shock Troopers can have Rapid Assault for +5D each.
Forward Positions: Up to 2 Shock Troopers can gain INFILTRATOR for +10D each.
Lightly-armoured: Only Lieutenant (Hauptmann) and Mechanized Heavy Infantry can have Reinforced Armour or Machine Armour.
Automatic Pistols are NOT ELITE-only in this warband (Limit: 3).
Troop Selection: Must include 2-8 Shock Troopers. No Trench Moles. Max 1 Sniper Priest, max 1 Mechanized Heavy Infantry.
